verses.text: Tu-in David a inn-ah a ten' ciangin amah in kamsang Nathan kiangah, “En in, taamtak inn hoih sungah kei ka teng a, ahih hangin puanbuk nuai-ah Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang om lai hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “Pasian in nang hong ompih ahih manin na lungsimah a om khempeuh hih in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin tua zan mahin Nathan kiangah Topa' thu hong tung a
“Pai in la ka nasempa David kiangah hih bangin gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangmah in keima ten'na dingin biakinn na lam kei ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te ka paipihtoh-a kipan tuni dongin biakinn sungah ka teng kei a, puanbuk khat pan puanbuk khat, omna khat pan omna khatah ka pai kawikawi hi

Israel mi khempeuh tawh ka painasa mun khempeuhah, keima mite tuu bangin a cing dingin ka sawl thukhente khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Bang hangin taamtak biakinn khat kei-a' dingin hong lamsaklo na hi hiam?” ci-in kam khat beek ka gen hiam?’ ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasempa David kiangah hih bangin na ci ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian ahi dingin lonona, tuu na zuihna panin nang kong la hi
Na paina peuhpeuhah nang tawh kong omkhin a, na mai panin na galte khempeuh ka susia hi. Leitung miliante khat min bangin nang-a' dingin min khat kong bawlsak ding hi

Amau' inn ciatah a ten' theihna ding leh a kinawngkaisak nawnlohna dingin ka mi Israel-te-a' dingin mun khat sehin amaute ka phut ding hi. Ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka seh-a kipanin a nidanga bangin mi ngongtatte in amaute beisak nawnlo ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in na galte khempeuh ka nuaisiah ding hi. Tua thamloin Topa keimah in nang a lianin hong bawlin, suanlekhak na neihna ding thu nang tungah kong gen hi
Na nuntakna bei-in na pate kiang na zuat ciangin nangma nungah na tapate khat ka khangsak ding a, ama kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi
Amah in kei-a' dingin biakinn khat hong lamsak ding a, keimah in ama kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi
Kei pen ama pa ka hi ding a, amah pen keima tapa hi ding hi. Nangma hun ma-a sem Saul' tung panin ka lakkhiat bangin nangma tung panin ka itna kip ka lakhia kei ding a
ka mite leh ka kumpi gam a kem dingin amah ka koih ding a, ama kumpi tokhom kip paisuak ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Hih kammalte khempeuh tawh kizui leh hih maangmuhna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Nathan in David kiangah a gen hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi David tumin Topa' mai-ah tu a, “ Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in hih ciangdong kei nong tun'pihna kei kua hi a, ka innkuanpihte bang ahi hiam

Hih a beisa thu pen nangma mitah na neu khat ahi hi, Pasian aw. Nangmah in a hong tung ding hunpi khat sung tangding na nasempa' suanlekhak tawh kisai thu zong na gen khin a, mailama khang dingte thu kei nong lak khin hi, Topa Pasian
Na nasempa nong pahtawina-ah David in nang tungah bang gen ding nei nawn ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na nasempa na thei hi
Topa aw, na nasempa' hang, leh nangma lungsim bangin hih na liante khempeuh na kitheihsakna-ah hih liatna khempeuh na hih hi
Ka bilun ka zakna uh tawh kizui-in Topa aw, nangmah tawh a kibang kuamah omlo a, nang simloh Pasian dang omlo hi

Egypt panin na hotkhiat na mite' mai-ah minam dangte hawlkhiatna tawh nang-a' dingin a lian a lauhuai min khat na bawlna, Pasian pai-in ama mi dingin a hotkhiat Israel-te tawh a kibang mi leitungah minam dang kua om ahi hiam
Na mi Israel-te a tawntungin nangma mi ahi dingin na bawl hi. Tua ciangin Topa aw, nang pen amaute' Pasian na suak hi
“Tu-in Topa aw, na nasempa leh a suan a khakte tawh kisai-in na gensa thu a tawntungin kip hen la, na gensa bangin hong hih in
Tua ciangin, ‘Israel Pasian, Vanglian Topa pen Israel-te' Pasian hi,’ ci-in nangma min a tawntungin kipin kiliansak ding a, na nasempa David' ukna nangma mai-ah kip tawntung ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nang ka Pasian in keima suante kumpi-in nong bawlsakna ding na nasempa tungah nong lak khinzo hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nasempa in na mai-ah thu nget ding han'na lungsim hong nei hi
Tu-in Topa aw, nang, Pasian na hi a, na nasempa tungah hih na hoih na ciam khin hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangma mai-ah a kizop tawntung theihna dingin na nasempa' suanlekhakte thupha na piak ding nang hong lungkim ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah in thupha na piaksate a tawntungin thupha ngah ahi hi,” a ci hi.
